name: schema-registry-dag-schema-quality-analyzer
description: T206 SchemaQualityAnalyzer — SCHEDULED archetype. Analyzes schema quality metrics: completeness, field coverage, deprecation ratio. Tenant-scoped. Emits SchemaQualityReport.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: scheduled entry, tenant-scoped quality metrics, completeness+coverage+deprecation metrics, SchemaQualityReport emission
Retrieve SCHEDULED arch pattern + quality-metrics + schema-completeness + deprecation-ratio + tenant-scoped-analytics patterns for T206

Break T206 into: scheduled trigger → load all schemas for tenant → compute completeness score → compute field coverage → compute deprecation ratio → build QualityReport → storeDocument → emit SchemaQualityReport

Generate schema-quality-analyzer.service.ts — CRON or queue-scheduled, reads all schemas via DATABASE (tenant-scoped from ALS), computes: completeness (required fields present ratio), fieldCoverage (average field documentation ratio), deprecationRatio (deprecated/total). DNA-8: storeDocument(qualityReport) BEFORE emitting SchemaQualityReport.
Named check validation: scheduled_entry, tenant_scoped_from_als, completeness_metric_computed, field_coverage_computed, deprecation_ratio_computed, store_before_emit
Score generated code 0-100 against T206 iron rules: scheduled entry, all three quality metrics, tenant isolation, DNA-8 compliance
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=scheduled-entry+all-three-metrics+tenant-scoped+store-before-emit, rejected=http-triggered OR missing-metric OR cross-tenant-read OR emit-before-store. curriculumTier=1.
